/ What we install

Every system your fleet runs on.

01GPS Fleet TrackingReal-time location, geofencing, and route data on any vehicle class.
02ELD ComplianceFMCSA-compliant, wired to the ECM, inspection-ready.
03AI Dash CamerasDual-facing, calibrated, mounted legal.
04Fleet Security & Live VideoRemote monitoring, motion events, weather-sealed.
05Asset TrackingPowered or battery trackers on trailers and equipment.
06De-Install & UpgradeClean swaps off old systems, vehicle restored to factory.
/ The work

One crew. Every kind of fleet.

We've wired everything from sedans to garbage trucks to the same standard. A sample of the fleets we've worked:

A

Large delivery & logistics

High-volume van and box-truck rollouts.

B

Facility-services fleets

Mixed light- and medium-duty across regions.

C

Class I railyard & OTR chassis

Intermodal chassis in active rail environments.

D

Pest-control fleets

Service vehicles, route-tracked and camera-equipped.

E

Construction supply

Heavy-duty and equipment installs.

F

Moving & refuse fleets

Box trucks through heavy refuse chassis.

Job types only — we don't name the fleets we've serviced.

/ Systems we install

We install the platforms fleets actually run.

Motive, Samsara, or Netradyne — whichever fits the fleet. Shown from our own installs.

Motive Vehicle Gateway — chassis
Motive
Vehicle Gateway · AI Dashcam

We install Motive’s full lineup — from the Vehicle Gateway shown here to the all-in-one AI Dashcam Plus that folds gateway, camera, and ELD into one unit.

Netradyne Driveri — pre-install
Netradyne Driveri D-450
AI vision · driver safety

Multi-camera vision system for coaching and incident detection, mounted and calibrated.

Samsara CM34 · install photo coming
Samsara CM34
Dual-facing AI dash cam

Road and cabin coverage paired with the Samsara gateway, wired and verified.

/ On site

How a job runs.

01

Walk the fleet

Vehicle classes, hardware, mount points, and when we can pull the trucks.

02

Pull power right

Metered, fused, on the correct circuit. No back-probe guesses.

03

Mount and route

Secured, loomed, airbag-safe, factory trim back on.

04

Confirm it reports

Device live in the platform before we leave the yard.

05

Hand it off

Walk the dashboard, log the unit, done.
